steps.title: Identify what property the gas clouds possess
steps.content: The passage establishes that these stellar formations “cannot be touched,” then asserts they “need not remain completely ______.” This parallel structure signals that the blank should name the very property of being untouchable that Nia's 3D models overcome.

steps.title: Match the property to the correct choice
steps.content: Intangible (unable to be touched or grasped physically) directly identifies the core problem these gas clouds present and what Nia's interactive models address — they make naturally untouchable formations tangible and interactive to researchers. The other options describe unrelated properties or contradict the passage's purpose of making phenomena more accessible and understandable. That matches choice C — C is correct.
